label: clean-email-no-claims
body: Thanks for your interest in GT School. We'd love to set up a time to walk your family through our program and answer any questions.

label: clean-faq-self-evident-claim
body: GT School is a learning program for families. Our team is happy to help you understand the enrollment steps.

claims.text: GT School is a learning program for families.

label: clean-nudge-sourced-empirical-claim
body: A quick reminder that your enrollment application is still open. Many families complete it in under ten minutes.

claims.text: Many families complete it in under ten minutes.

label: block-4x-speed-multiplier
body: Our students learn at 4X speed compared to traditional schools.

label: block-2x-speed-multiplier
body: Kids progress 2X faster with our program.

label: block-superlative-the-best
body: GT School is the best school in the country for gifted learners.

label: block-guaranteed-outcome
body: Enroll today and your child is guaranteed to excel.

label: block-will-get-into
body: With our program your child will get into any college they choose.

label: block-unsourced-empirical-claim
body: Ninety percent of our families re-enroll the following year.

claims.text: Ninety percent of our families re-enroll the following year.

label: block-minor-targeting-audience
body: Hey kids, sign up for our after-school club today!

label: block-minor-pii-handle
body: Reach out to your 12-year-old @timmy_grade6 to confirm his schedule.
